title: Pari
tmdbOverview: Arnab tries to help Ruksahana, who is found under mysterious circumstances in a house. He lets her stay at his home until he discovers something strange about her.
synopsis: Pari (2018) is a horror and mystery film from India. It carries a 6.6 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
